title: Promotions
summary: MCAAT Admin checklist - Promotions. 26 unique items across 3 audiences.
applicabilityLevel: IPAC, Reporting Unit, and Supporting Unit

source.title: MCAAT Admin Checklist - Promotions
source.publisher: Marine Corps Manpower and Reserve Affairs

items.question: Are Meritorious Promotions reported IAW applicable regulations?
Are Meritorious Promotion Warrants (DD Form 216 MC) filed in OMPF within 10 working days from the date reported on unit diary?
Are CRB(s) reported IAW applicable regulations?
Are CRB documents filed in OMPF within 10 working days from the date reported on unit diary?
Are Meritorious Promotion Warrants (DD Form 216 MC) filed in OMPF within 10 working days from the date reported on unit diary?
Are Meritorious Promotions reported IAW applicable regulations?
Is the unit ensuring CRB(s) are approved by the Commanding Officer who exercises promotion authority?
Are CRB documents filed in OMPF within 10 working days from the effective date?
Are CRB(s) reported IAW applicable regulations?
Is the unit ensuring only the individual(s) with the appropriate promotion authority is certifying promotion recommendation entries?
Is the unit ensuring JEPES occasions are approved by the individual with appropriate promotion authority?
Is the unit ensuring the JEPES occasions are approved no later than the last day of the JEPES occasion date?
Is the unit reviewing the remedial tab within JEPES and ensuring the appropriate remedial promotion action(s) is completed after the JEPES / MCTFS record has been corrected?

Has the unit established internal control measures to review Marines in a non-rec status IAW applicable regulations? (to include ensuring justification is provided for Marines left in a Not Recommended status for longer than 6 Months).
Is the unit ensuring Meritorious Promotion Warrant(s) are maintained on file for audit, and in accordance with retention policies?
Is the unit ensuring CRB(s) are approved by the Commanding Officer who exercises promotion authority?
Is the unit ensuring approved CRB(s) are submitted to and received by the reporting unit within 5 days of occurrence?
Is the unit validating the DOR and effective date of the admin reduction is reported IAW applicable regulations by the reporting unit?

Is the unit ensuring required page 11 entries for Negative Promotion Recommendations and Marines recommended for promotion prior to the end of a not-recommended period are filed in OMPF within 10 working days from the effective date?
Is the unit ensuring JEPES occasions are approved by the individual with appropriate promotion authority?
Is the unit ensuring the JEPES occasions are approved no later than the last day of the JEPES occasion date?
Is the unit reviewing the remedial tab within JEPES and ensuring the appropriate remedial promotion action(s) is completed after the JEPES / MCTFS record has been corrected?
Is the unit ensuring required page 11 entries for Negative Promotion Recommendations are completed IAW applicable regulations?
Is the unit ensuring CRB(s) packages are maintained on file for audit, and in accordance with retention policies?

Has the unit established internal control measures to review Marines in a non-rec status IAW applicable regulations? (to include ensuring justification is provided for Marines left in a Not Recommended status for longer than 6 Months).
Is the unit ensuring only the individual(s) with the appropriate promotion authority is certifying promotion recommendation entries?
